title: Creating an Agent's Communication Protocol
scenario: Design a basic communication protocol for an agent that interacts with customers. The protocol should include a greeting, a way to ask questions, and a way to provide answers. The output should be in the format of a simple flowchart.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 100-word limit.
Check if the flowchart is clear and easy to understand.
Check if the output is grammatically correct.
